character_identity: A charismatic young adult orange tabby cat with an athletic, compact build, expressive oversized eyes, sharp orange tabby markings, fluffy cheek fur, and a mischievous confident smile. Hunk Mao is cool, clever, energetic, adventurous, and slightly chaotic. He should look like a stylish internet culture icon and adventurous young hero, never obese, elderly, babyish, or shaped like a generic round prosperity cat.
character_style: expressive face and large lively eyes
black hoodie, cap, sunglasses, sneakers, chains, or themed costumes when appropriate to the scene
dynamic poses and active body language
recognizably the same recurring character in every image
avoid_character_traits: static seated pose in every image

visual_signature.face: large lively eyes, fluffy cheek fur, mischievous confident smile
visual_signature.never: do not make him obese, elderly, babyish, statue-like, or generic
